bird.name: Black shama
bird.summary: The Black shama (Copsychus cebuensis) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. It is endemic to the island of Cebu, Philippines whe…

relations.subject: Black shama
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Black shama
relations.evidence: This species' main threat is habitat loss with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of legal and illegal logging, mining and conversion into farmlands through Slash-and-burn and urbanization
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

relations.subject: Black shama
relations.evidence: Up until today, the forests of Cebu still receive hunting pressure and deforestation — further reducing what little there is remaining
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
